# files_user_additional_email_recipient (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "files_user_additional_email_recipient" "example_user_additional_email_recipient" {
  user_id = 1
  email   = "user-copy@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Additional email recipient address

### Optional

- `user_id` (Number) User ID

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Created at date/time
- `id` (Number) User additional email recipient ID
- `workspace_id` (Number) Workspace ID (0 for default workspace).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# User Additional Email Recipients can be imported by specifying the id.
terraform import files_user_additional_email_recipient.example_user_additional_email_recipient 1
```
